achievements.title: AINCAT 2025 - National Rank #3567
achievements.description: Successfully participated in AINCAT 2025, India's Biggest Career Aptitude Test conducted by Naukri.com, securing a rank among thousands of talented participants nationwide.

achievements.title: TCS CodeVita Season 12 - Global Rank 7574
achievements.description: Secured a global rank of 7574 in TCS CodeVita Season 12 – one of the world's largest coding competitions! An amazing experience that tested problem-solving skills.
